message:
🌱 Reduce mission index cache TTL from 1 hour to 15 minutes (#1705)

New missions added to console-kb were taking up to 1 hour to appear
on console.kubestellar.io due to the Netlify Blob cache TTL. Since
raw.githubusercontent.com doesn't count against API rate limits,
15 minutes is safe and gives faster visibility for new content.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
